fields.title: Register thread tools in main session and workers
fields.description: Register find_thread and read_thread tools in tau's main session, worker agents, and update allowlists.
fields.design: Register tools in extensions/tau/src/app.ts before agent init. Add to worker custom tools in extensions/tau/src/agent/worker.ts. Add to WORKER_AVAILABLE_TOOL_NAMES in extensions/tau/src/agent/startup-validation.ts. Add to MODE_AGENT_TOOLS in extensions/tau/src/agent/agent-registry.ts for smart/deep/rush modes. Update extensions/tau/agents/oracle.md to include both tools. Tools should be available in: main session, smart/deep/rush mode agents, oracle.
